page_content:
GenEd (3 credits)

Most biochemistry majors will elect to take BCHM 461 in semester 5.

Biochemistry Major, Spring Sophomore Year (16 Credits)

CHEM 276 (2 credits) General Chemistry and Energetics

Two hours of lecture and one hour of discussion/recitation per week. An introduction to the physical aspects of chemistry for BCHM and CHEM majors. Chemical kinetics, thermodynamics and electrochemistry in the context of current chemistry research.
